$comment: Layer 2B localization question set. Each item has a natural-language question, the known-correct answer file (path relative to the repo root, as emitted by Fuse), and a focus_seed: a single salient concept an agent might guess. Accuracy is exact-match: did the surfaced context include the answer file within the token budget. Reproducible at the pinned commits in corpus.json.

questions.question: Which file contains the mediator implementation that sends a request to its handler?
Where is notification publishing handled by awaiting each handler one after another?
Which file registers MediatR handler services into the dependency injection container?
Where are the built-in rule extension methods such as NotNull and NotEmpty defined?
Which file defines the abstract base class that user validators inherit from?
Where is the rule that checks a string is a valid email address implemented?
Which file holds the main entry-point class that maps one object to another?
Where is the execution plan for a type map compiled into a mapping function?
Which file provides the queryable ProjectTo extension methods for IQueryable?
Which file contains the serializer that reads and writes JSON through converters?
Where is the forward-only reader that parses JSON from text implemented?
Which file defines the LINQ-to-JSON object node type?
